Result: 在多个数据集上评估表明，SelectInfer在显著减少内存占用和计算量的同时，保持了任务性能。

Conclusion: SelectInfer为实现LLM在边缘设备上的实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a range of Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, but their high computational and memory demands pose significant challenges for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. Existing approaches to model compression and optimization often rely on coarse-grained pruning or quantization, which can compromise accuracy or require re-training and fine-tuning. In this work, we introduce SelectInfer, a neuron-level optimization framework that enables efficient LLM inference on edge devices through selective neuron loading and computation. By profiling and identifying both task-specific and general-purpose neurons using an offline LLM profiler, SelectInfer implements two key optimizations: selective loading, which reduces memory footprint by selectively loading a subset of neurons that were identified to be most important during the offline stage, and selective computation, which dynamically computes only the most relevant neurons at runtime. Evaluation across multiple datasets shows that SelectInfer achieves significant reductions in memory footprint and computation while preserving task performance, making it a practical step towards enabling LLM deployment on edge devices

</details>


### [470] [Enhancing Rubric-based RL via Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18082)
*Mingxuan Xia,Yuhang Yang,Chao Ye,Shuai Zhu,Shenzhi Yang,Guangcheng Zhu,Yuhang Zhang,Cheng Peng,Haobo Wang,Siqing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CriPO方法，通过on-policy自蒸馏同时解决基于rubric的强化学习中的未探索准则(UC)和抑制准则(SC)问题，在两个基准上以约2倍少的优化步骤取得更好性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于rubric的强化学习面临两个关键问题：(1) 未探索准则(UC)导致缺少优化信号；(2) 抑制准则(SC)即使被满足，其学习信号也在标量奖励聚合中被丢失。此外，探索导向方法存在训练-推理不匹配问题。

Method: 提出Criterion-Distilled Policy Optimization (CriPO)，通过on-policy自蒸馏同时处理UC和SC：对UC构建准则注入自教师并计算局部前向KL损失；对SC使用反事实自教师定位负优势rollout中准则相关token并翻转其优势值为正。

Result: 在医学和科学基准上的实验表明，CriPO持续优于基于rubric的RL基线，以约2倍少的优化步骤取得更强的最终性能。分析发现SC非常普遍：超过57%的样本在训练过程中出现此问题，平均每个样本有1.8个SC。

Conclusion: CriPO有效解决了rubric-based RL中UC和SC两类失败模式，且不引入训练-推理不匹配，显著提升了优化效率和最终性能。

Abstract: Rubric-based RL has recently shown promise in improving LLMs on open-ended tasks. A widely recognized limitation of rubric-based RL is limited exploration: criteria that no rollout manages to satisfy (Unexplored Criteria, UC) receive no optimization signal. Recent methods address this by incorporating rubric information as external guidance during rollout, yet they introduce a train-inference mismatch: the policy is optimized on rollouts produced under external guidance while this guidance is absent at inference time, causing error accumulation through autoregressive decoding. Moreover, these exploration-focused approaches overlook a fundamentally different failure mode that we term Suppressed Criteria (SC) -- criteria that are satisfied by some rollouts yet whose learning signals are lost during optimization because scalar reward aggregation assigns them non-positive aggregate advantages. Our analysis reveals that SC are remarkably prevalent: over 57% of samples exhibit this failure mode throughout training, with an average of 1.8 SC per sample. To simultaneously address both UC and SC without introducing training-inference mismatch, we propose Criterion-Distilled Policy Optimization (CriPO), which enhances rubric-based RL via on-policy self-distillation. For UC, CriPO constructs a criterion-injection self-teacher and computes a localized forward-KL loss to inject missing behaviors into the policy. For SC, CriPO employs a counterfactual self-teacher to locate criterion-relevant tokens in negative-advantage rollouts and flips their token-level advantages to positive values, preserving useful patterns that would otherwise be suppressed. Experiments on medicine and science benchmarks demonstrate that CriPO consistently outperforms rubric-based RL, achieving stronger final performance with approximately $2\times$ fewer optimization steps.

</details>


### [471] [The Label Complexity of Class-Conditional Coverage under Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18088)
*Weijia Han,Lisha Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了分类器在分布偏移下保持逐类覆盖有效性的代价。实验表明，虽然边际覆盖能保持名义水平（约90%），但逐类覆盖会严重下降（最差类别仅70%）。研究发现：无标签方法无法同时实现有效且高效的逐类覆盖；仅保证逐类有效性只需每类少量目标标签，但要同时保证效率则需要与容忍度平方成反比的标签量；利用分类器伪标签最多只能获得小常数因子的效率提升。在骨架动作识别和自然图像损坏基准上验证了这些发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估系统存在分布偏移，导致分类器虽保持边际覆盖水平，但逐类覆盖性能严重下降，需要量化恢复逐类覆盖有效性的代价。

Method: 通过理论下界和上界分析证明无标签方法无法实现有效且高效的逐类覆盖；推导出同时实现逐类有效性和效率所需标签数量的精确边界；在骨架动作识别和自然图像损坏基准上进行实验验证。

Result: 边际覆盖保持在90%附近时，最差动作类覆盖仅约70%，60个类别中有10个低于80%。仅恢复逐类有效性只需每类少量目标标签，但兼顾效率则需要与容忍度平方成反比、与类别数对数成正比的标签量。伪标签最多提供小常数因子效率提升。

Conclusion: 分布偏移下逐类覆盖的恢复存在明确的理论代价：无标签方法不可行，所需标签量有精确的上下界。仅使用源标签的逐类校准可恢复大部分逐类差距，但边际覆盖本身崩溃时该方法失效。

Abstract: Standard evaluation of many recognition systems contains distribution shift by construction, since benchmarks place disjoint conditions in the training and test splits. Under such a shift, split conformal prediction keeps marginal coverage near the nominal level while per-class coverage fails silently: on a real cross-subject skeleton benchmark, marginal coverage stays near ninety percent, the worst action class is covered about seventy percent of the time, and ten of the sixty classes fall below eighty percent coverage.
  We characterize the cost of restoring per-class validity. First, an impossibility: once the shift acts jointly on the covariates and the labels, the target class-conditional score law is unidentified from source labels and an unlabeled target sample, so no label-free method attains per-class coverage that is at once valid and efficient. Second, we make the cost precise: per-class validity alone needs only a handful of target labels per class, while the label count necessary and sufficient for validity together with per-class efficiency grows as the inverse square of the efficiency tolerance and the logarithm of the number of classes, with matching upper and lower bounds. Third, within the evaluated prediction-powered inference family, even the most favorable use of the classifier's own pseudo-labels on an unbounded unlabeled target pool improves efficiency by at most a small constant factor where coverage collapses.
  Skeleton action recognition is our real-data case study. A per-class calibration using source labels alone recovers a substantial share of the per-class gap while the shift preserves marginal coverage, and stops helping exactly when marginal coverage itself breaks. Three real shifts of increasing severity trace this boundary, and the same collapse and recovery appears on a natural-image corruption benchmark, beyond any single modality.

</details>


### [472] [Empowering On-Device Model Adaptation with an Edge AI Inference Accelerator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18101)
*Mateusz Piechocki,Alessandro Capotondi,Marek Kraft*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种异构适配管道，将商用边缘AI推理加速器（Hailo-8L）用于冻结主干的特征提取，仅微调轻量分类头，在资源受限设备上实现高效、低能耗的模型适应，训练速度提升最高15.4倍，能耗显著降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设备端模型适应对实现资源受限硬件上的终身个性化至关重要，但端到端反向传播在计算、功耗和内存限制下不切实际，因此需要更高效的适应方案。

Method: 计算图被分区：预训练主干量化为INT8并在加速器上运行，轻量FP32分类头在主机CPU上微调。利用商用边缘AI推理加速器Hailo-8L进行冻结主干特征提取。

Result: 相较于树莓派5 CPU基线，训练速度最高提升15.4倍，在有利设置下具有竞争性吞吐量，并持续降低每个样本的能耗。后训练量化恢复对保持特征质量和减少量化敏感架构的精度损失至关重要。

Conclusion: 该方法展示了使用面向推理的边缘加速器进行高效设备端适应的实用方案，实现了频繁、低能耗的现场更新，同时大部分权重保持固定。

Abstract: On-device model adaptation is essential to enable lifelong personalization on resource-constrained hardware, but compute, power, and memory limitations of such devices make end-to-end backpropagation impractical for modern deep neural networks. This work proposes a heterogeneous adaptation pipeline that repurposes a commercial edge AI inference accelerator, Hailo-8L, for frozen-backbone feature extraction during on-device training. The computational graph is partitioned so that the pre-trained backbone is quantized to INT8 and run on the accelerator, while only a lightweight FP32 classification head is fine-tuned on the host CPU, enabling frequent, energy-efficient in-field updates with most weights remaining fixed. Across multiple architectures and datasets, this pipeline achieves up to 15.4x faster wall-clock training time compared to a Raspberry Pi 5 CPU baseline, offers competitive throughput in favorable settings, and consistently reduces energy per sample. Post-training quantization restoration is shown to be crucial for preserving the quality of accelerator-generated features and mitigating accuracy loss in quantization-sensitive architectures. Overall, the results demonstrate a practical approach to efficient on-device adaptation using inference-oriented edge accelerators. The implementation is available at https://github.com/MatPiech/accelerator-training.

</details>


### [473] [LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18110)
*Tianzhu Ye,Li Dong,Guanheng Chen,He Zhu,Xun Wu,Shaohan Huang,Furu Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出经验学习（EL），将LLM裁判模型的标量奖励反馈转化为高带宽的经验知识，通过教师模型和上下文蒸馏指导策略学习，在开放式任务上优于传统强化学习，且更好泛化和缓解奖励破解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RL在开放式任务中将基于评分标准的评估压缩为标量奖励，丢失了丰富的文本反馈，且无法区分不同质量的响应之间的细微差异。

Method: 将LLM-as-a-Judge改造为LLM-as-a-Coach，教练模型将评估蒸馏为可迁移的经验知识，用于条件化教师模型，策略通过上下文蒸馏内化这些知识。

Result: 在两种策略家族中，使用自身或专有模型反馈，EL在保留和未见开放式任务上均优于基于评分标准的RL；EL泛化性更好，且能缓解奖励破解。

Conclusion: 经验知识作为更丰富、更可泛化的学习信号，适用于非可验证任务的后训练阶段。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judge into an LLM-as-a-Coach. The coach distills its assessment of each on-policy response into transferable experiential knowledge, which conditions a teacher model and is internalized by the policy through on-policy context distillation. Compared with scalar rewards, this higher-bandwidth feedback channel provides dense supervision and preserves fine-grained preferences among high-quality responses. Across two policy families, with feedback from the policy itself or a proprietary model, EL consistently outperforms rubric-based RL on held-out and unseen open-ended tasks. Notably, EL generalizes better beyond the training distribution, and mitigates reward hacking. These findings establish experiential knowledge as a richer and more generalizable learning signal for post-training on non-verifiable tasks.

</details>


### [474] [Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for Parameter-Efficient Finetuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18130)
*Valentijn Oldenburg,Floris de Kam,Bente Zuijdam,Lieve Eberson,Nicky van Zutphen,Stef de Wildt,Ivo Verhoeven*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出流形约束超连接（mHC）作为残差连接的一种泛化形式，用于参数高效微调（PEFT）。实验表明，mHC单独使用时性能不一定优于LoRA，但与LoRA结合可在相同参数量预算下提升语言建模损失和任务性能，证明残差路由是一条有前景的PEFT新方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT方法大多调整权重或激活值，但忽略了残差连接这一关键Transformer组件，作者试图探索残差连接本身能否作为PEFT的一种有效手段。

Method: 将冻结的OLMo-2骨干网络包裹可学习的残差路由模块，即流形约束超连接（mHC）。在微调时固定残差混合矩阵为单位矩阵，并尝试mHC单独使用及与LoRA组合使用。

Result: 1) mHC可单独用于微调冻结Transformer，但效果不稳定；2) 固定残差混合矩阵为单位矩阵往往提升性能；3) mHC单独使用不总是优于LoRA；4) 在相同参数量预算下，mHC+LoRA组合在1B和7B规模上均改善了语言建模损失，并在部分基准任务上取得性能提升。

Conclusion: 残差路由是一条区别于现有PEFT方法的新轴，mHC+LoRA的组合方案展示了该方向的潜力，值得进一步探索。

Abstract: Most parameter-efficient finetuning (PEFT) methods adapt weights or activations, thus leaving one of the key Transformer components unchanged: residual connections. This paper investigates Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), a generalisation of residual connections, as a novel PEFT approach, wrapping frozen OLMo-2 backbones with learned residual routing modules. We find that mHC can finetune frozen Transformers, but that its role differs fundamentally from the original pre-training setting: in finetuning, fixing the residual mixing matrix to identity often improves performance. As a standalone PEFT method, mHC does not consistently outperform LoRA. However, at matched trainable parameter budgets, mHC+LoRA combinations improve language-modelling loss and show task-dependent benchmark gains at both 1B and 7B scale. Overall, our results identify residual routing as a distinct and promising novel PEFT axis.

</details>


### [475] [Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18144)
*Thomas MacDougall,Maksim Kuznetsov,Roman Schutski,Rim Shayakhmetov,Maxim Malkov,Vladimir Aladinskiy,Alex Aliper,Alex Zhavoronkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了通用大语言模型（LLM）在结构药物设计中处理复杂3D空间约束（如锚定片段、药效团点、口袋-配体相互作用）的能力，提出了名为3D-Fit的基准测试策略。结果表明，虽然LLM在性能上仍落后于专用扩散模型，但展现出同时处理多种空间约束的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的3D分子生成方法表现优异，而LLM在分子设计中虽崭露头角，但其在物理和3D空间推理方面的能力尚不明确。本文旨在系统评估通用LLM是否具备应对复杂3D约束的能力。

Method: 提出了3D-Fit基准测试策略，评估LLM在多种空间约束（锚定片段、药效团点、口袋-配体相互作用）下的分子生成性能，并与专用扩散模型进行对比。

Result: LLM在3D分子生成任务上仍落后于最先进的扩散模型方法，但展现出同时处理多种空间约束的潜力，具备向异构场景扩展的能力。

Conclusion: 通用LLM在结构药物设计的3D空间推理方面有前景但仍需提升，其多约束并行处理能力为未来异构场景下的分子设计提供了新方向。

Abstract: Structure-based drug design (SBDD) leverages the 3D structure of protein targets, often complemented by other spatial constraints, to generate candidate binding molecules. While diffusion models have dominated as a leading paradigm for high-quality 3D molecule generation, LLM-based methods are rapidly emerging in molecular design and have shown competitive performance in pocket-conditioned molecular generation. However, their ability to reason about physics and 3D spatial environments is largely underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze whether current general-purpose LLMs are capable of navigating complex 3D constraints compared to established baselines such as specialized diffusion models. We consider 3D ligand generation conditioned on protein pockets together with ligand- and interaction-derived spatial constraints, including anchor fragments, pharmacophore points, and mandatory pocket-ligand interactions. To enable this evaluation, we introduce 3D-Fit - a token-efficient benchmarking strategy for assessing LLM performance on multi-conditioned spatial molecule generation. Our findings reveal a clear pattern in LLM spatial capabilities: while they still lag behind state-of-the-art approaches, they are promising and can handle multiple spatial constraints simultaneously, enabling scaling to heterogeneous setups.

</details>


### [476] [Totally Positive Matrices and the Highest-Order Coefficients of the Characteristic Polynomial](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18148)
*Tiago Closs,Leandro Farina*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究是否可以通过特征多项式的高阶系数区分完全正矩阵，利用神经网络和特征归因方法发现系数(a_{n-1}, a_{n-2}, a_{n-3})在多个维度上能有效分离完全正与非完全正矩阵，且不同结构的完全正矩阵族呈现不同的椭球签名，并据此提出了一个几何分离猜想。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究完全正矩阵能否通过其特征多项式的最高阶系数被有效区分，并识别最具信息量的系数。

Method: 使用神经网络分类器结合特征归因方法，基于正双对角矩阵乘积、Vandermonde矩阵和Cauchy矩阵等结构化完全正矩阵族构建数据集，在维度5、10、30下分析系数(a_{n-1}, a_{n-2}, a_{n-3})的区分能力。

Result: 三个最高阶系数已包含强判别信息，能实现完全正与非完全正矩阵的非线性分离；该分离在三维系数空间中可通过马氏椭球进行几何描述，且不同结构化完全正矩阵族呈现不同的椭球签名，签名间距离随维度增加而增大。

Conclusion: 基于上述观察，提出了关于结构化完全正矩阵族在三个最高阶特征系数空间中几何分离的猜想。

Abstract: We investigate the extent to which totally positive matrices can be distinguished through the highest-order coefficients of their characteristic polynomials. To identify the most informative coefficients, we also employed neural-network classifiers together with feature-attribution methods. Using datasets built from several structured totally positive families, including products of positive bidiagonal matrices, Vandermonde matrices, and Cauchy matrices, we find that the coefficients (a_{n-1}, a_{n-2}, a_{n-3}) already contain strong discriminatory information for separating totally positive from non-totally positive matrices in dimensions 5, 10, and 30. The resulting separation is markedly nonlinear and admits a natural geometric description in the corresponding three-dimensional coefficient space by means of Mahalanobis ellipsoids. These ellipsoids enclose the totally positive samples while excluding most non-totally positive ones. Moreover, different structured totally positive families exhibit distinct ellipsoidal signatures, and the separation between these signatures increases with the dimension. These observations lead us to formulate a conjecture on the geometric separation of structured totally positive families in the space determined by the three highest-order characteristic coefficients.

</details>


### [477] [Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18149)
*Shyamal Y. Dharia,Stephen D. Smith,Camilo E. Valderrama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究将可微分逻辑门网络（Diff-Logic）应用于边缘设备上的实时EEG分类，通过将模型编译为纯布尔电路，在保持竞争性或更优性能的同时，显著降低延迟和模型大小，特别适合资源受限的脑机接口场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统神经网络在边缘设备上进行实时EEG分类时受限于浮点运算，存在延迟高、模型大的瓶颈，亟需一种硬件原生、高效且性能不降级的替代方案。

Method: 采用可微分逻辑门网络（Diff-Logic），将模型编译为纯布尔电路，通过位级CPU操作执行。在四个EEG数据集上，与同等容量的MLP和二值化神经网络（BNN）进行等参数对比实验，涵盖二分类痴呆检测和三分类情绪识别任务，模型复杂度分四个层级（50k-500k参数）。

Result: 在痴呆筛查任务中，Diff-Logic达到80.2% Macro F1，比MLP基线高6.8%。在情绪识别任务中，MLP虽保持一定性能优势，但在Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano CPU（单核）上延迟高2.3倍、模型大14倍。Diff-Logic推理时间在模型规模扩大10倍时几乎不变，最大复杂度层级下相比MLP加速比达2.9倍。

Conclusion: 基于逻辑的神经架构为资源受限的脑机接口提供了一种实用范式，能在满足便携式边缘部署的延迟和内存约束的同时，达到竞争性乃至更优的性能。

Abstract: Real-time EEG classification on edge devices is bottlenecked by the floating-point arithmetic of conventional neural networks. We investigated Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (Diff-Logic) as a hardware-native alternative that compiles models into pure Boolean circuits executable via bitwise CPU operations. Through rigorous iso-parameter experiments across four EEG datasets spanning two classification tasks, binary dementia detection and 3-class emotion recognition, we compared Diff-Logic against matched-capacity Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) and Binarized Neural Network (BNN) baselines at four complexity tiers (50k-500k parameters). On dementia screening, Diff-Logic achieved 80.2% Macro F1, outperforming the MLP baseline by 6.8%. On emotion recognition, the MLP retained a moderate performance advantage but incurred a 2.3$\times$ higher latency and 14$\times$ larger model size when deployed on a power-constrained (7W) Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano CPU (Single-core). Critically, Diff-Logic inference time remained nearly constant across a 10$\times$ increase in model scale, achieving a peak speedup of 2.9$\times$ over MLPs at the largest complexity tier. Our results establish logic-based neural architectures as a practical paradigm for resource-constrained brain-computer interfaces, achieving competitive or superior performance while natively satisfying the latency and memory constraints of portable edge deployment. Code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/Shyamal-Dharia/eeg-difflogic

</details>


### [478] [The Calibration Channel Determines the Bayes-Error Proxy: An Exact Law for Temperature-Induced Distortion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18162)
*Shreyas Pradeepkumar Khandale*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了温度缩放（temperature scaling）如何扭曲软标签贝叶斯误差估计器β(z)=E[min(z,1-z)]，证明温度缩放可通过连续双射产生(0,1/2)区间内任意代理值，且代理值在恒定测试误差下可变化56倍至980倍，揭示代理值仅在其概率生成机制下才有意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究指出软标签贝叶斯误差估计器在非真实后验概率下表现脆弱，即使完美校准的软标签也可能产生严重不准确的估计。本文旨在量化最常用的后验校准方法——温度缩放——对代理值造成的扭曲程度。

Method: 通过理论推导证明温度缩放后的代理值与分类器边际分布之间的精确恒等式，建立温度与代理值之间的严格单调关系及连续双射；在高斯logits模型假设下推导出代理值-温度曲线的闭式解；在CIFAR-10、Fashion-MNIST、SVHN的八个二分类任务上进行实证验证。

Result: 温度缩放可将代理值映射到(0,1/2)任意值；恒定测试误差下代理值变化56倍至980倍；闭式解与经验曲线误差在0.018以内；最小化期望校准误差的温度与任何稳定代理值均不重合。

Conclusion: 研究精确刻画了温度缩放对代理值的扭曲机制，强化了实践建议：代理值只有与产生其概率的机制一起才有意义。

Abstract: The soft-label Bayes-error estimator beta(z) = E[min(z, 1-z)] of Ishida et al. estimates the irreducible error of a binary task directly from probability-valued labels. Recent work by Ushio et al. showed that this estimator is fragile when the probabilities are not the true posterior: even perfectly calibrated soft labels can yield a substantially inaccurate estimate, and they propose isotonic calibration as a consistent remedy. We complement that line of work by characterizing exactly how the most widely used post-hoc calibration map -- temperature scaling -- distorts the proxy. We prove an exact, model-free identity reducing the temperature-scaled proxy to the classifier's margin distribution, from which we obtain (i) strict monotonicity in the temperature and (ii) a continuous bijection from the temperature axis onto the open interval (0, 1/2), so that a fixed classifier -- with fixed decisions and fixed 0-1 error -- can be made to report any proxy value whatsoever. Under a Gaussian model of the logits we further derive a two-parameter closed form for the entire proxy-versus-temperature curve. Across CIFAR-10, Fashion-MNIST, and SVHN (eight binary tasks), the proxy varies by 56x to 980x at constant test error, the closed form reproduces the empirical curve to within 0.018, and the calibration temperature that minimizes the expected calibration error does not coincide with any stable proxy value. Our results give a precise, predictive account of the distortion whose existence motivates calibration-based remedies, and they reinforce the practical recommendation that a proxy value is meaningful only together with the mechanism that produced its probabilities.

</details>


### [479] [OR Else: A Differentiable Trust Region for Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18163)
*Chinmay Rane,Kanishka Tyagi,Michael Manry*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了输出重置（OR）作为一种平滑单边饱和规则，在PPO和GRPO算法中替代传统裁剪代理目标的效果。实验使用Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct模型在hh-rlhf数据集上评估，发现PPO-OR在GAE下奖励分数提升0.305，而GRPO-OR在组相对优势下未提升分数但优化行为更稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PPO和GRPO使用的裁剪代理目标在有利方向饱和时会导致标量目标导数的突变，本文探索输出重置（OR）这一平滑的单边饱和规则是否能成为大语言模型后训练中更有用的替代方案。

Method: 将PPO和GRPO中的裁剪策略项替换为OR平方边缘损失，在基于rollout的token对数比率空间操作，根据优势符号确定更新方向，Token在越过有利边界后贡献零直接OR残差。在Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct上使用Anthropic hh-rlhf数据集，搭配单一奖励模型和每方法三种子进行实验。

Result: GAE下PPO-OR平均最终奖励分数比PPO-clip高0.305，但跨种子方差更大。组相对优势下GRPO-OR未提升平均分数，但方差更小、终端OR残差接近零、超调比例下降；GRPO-OR与PPO-OR的优化行为不同，两组相对优势方法比GAE方法表现出更大的对数比率位移。

Conclusion: OR改变了两种匹配比较中的优化行为，但奖励效果因方法而异。在G=2时GRPO-OR的改进未转化为奖励分数增益，更大组规模是否改变这一结果尚待研究。报告分数为训练时奖励模型测量，非保留的人类偏好性能。

Abstract: PPO and the GRPO baseline studied here use clipped surrogate objectives whose favorable-direction saturation introduces an abrupt change in the scalar objective's derivative. We ask whether Output Reset (OR), a smooth one-sided saturation rule, offers a useful alternative for large language model post-training. PPO-OR and GRPO-OR replace the clipped policy term with an OR squared-margin loss in rollout-relative token log-ratio space; the advantage sign determines the update direction, and a token contributes zero direct OR residual after crossing the favorable margin. We compare PPO-clip with PPO-OR under generalized advantage estimation (GAE), and GRPO with GRPO-OR under group-relative advantages, using \texttt{Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct} on Anthropic \texttt{hh-rlhf} with one shared reward model and three seeds per method. Under GAE, PPO-OR has a mean final training-time reward-model score $0.305$ higher than PPO-clip, with a larger observed across-seed spread. Under group-relative advantages, GRPO-OR does not have a higher mean score, but shows a smaller observed spread, a near-zero terminal OR residual, and a declining overshoot fraction, while the matched GRPO clipped-objective trace remains variable. Both group-relative methods exhibit substantially larger rollout-to-current log-ratio displacement than the GAE methods, and OR does not consistently reduce it. Thus, OR changes optimization behavior in both matched comparisons, but the observed reward effect differs between them. At $G=2$, the GRPO-OR diagnostics do not translate into a reward-score gain. Whether larger groups change this outcome remains open. The reported scores are training-time reward-model measurements, not held-out human-preference performance.

</details>


### [480] [A Continual Validation, Updating, and Decision-Making Framework for Self-Adaptive Digital Twins via Robust Model Predictive Control: A Case Study in Additive Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18164)
*Yi-Ping Chen,Ying-Kuan Tsai,Vispi Karkaria,Seul Lee,Daniel Apley,Wei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个自适应数字孪生框架，集成Fisher评分漂移检测、LoRA高效微调和Mann-Whitney U统计验证，能够在概念漂移下维持代理模型的预测精度与不确定性量化，仅更新不到1%的参数，并在随机线性系统和定向能量沉积增材制造案例中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字孪生依赖的代理模型在运行条件变化时会出现概念漂移，导致模型性能下降。现有自适应框架缺乏检测更新需求的原理性机制、高效适应有限的流数据的方法，以及认证更新是否真正改善预测性能的手段。

Method: 提出一个自适应框架，包含三个核心组件：基于Fisher评分的多变量漂移检测器监测代理模型置信度；低秩适配（LoRA）实现参数高效的持续学习（仅更新<1%参数）；Mann-Whitney U检验在线统计验证预测性能改善。

Result: 在随机线性系统和定向能量沉积增材制造两个案例中，该框架能够在短延迟内检测到分布偏移，并在突然性和渐进性漂移下恢复预测精度和不确定性量化。

Conclusion: 该框架为维持基于神经网络的数字孪生在整个运行生命周期中的可信度提供了一条统计严谨且计算可行的路径。

Abstract: Digital Twins rely on surrogate models to mirror physical systems in real time, yet these models can degrade as operating conditions evolve, a phenomenon known as concept drift. Maintaining surrogate fidelity under drift, particularly when models must also capture aleatoric uncertainty, remains an open challenge. Existing adaptive frameworks lack principled mechanisms for detecting when updates are needed, for efficiently adapting models from limited streaming data, and for certifying that updates genuinely improve predictive performance. Here we present an adaptive Digital Twin framework that integrates a Fisher score--based multivariate drift detector, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for parameter-efficient continual learning, and a Mann--Whitney $U$ test for online statistical validation. The framework monitors surrogate-model confidence via Fisher score vectors, triggers targeted fine-tuning of fewer than 1% of model parameters upon drift detection, and statistically certifies predictive improvement before deploying the updated surrogate. Applied to a stochastic linear system and a directed energy deposition additive manufacturing process as case studies, the framework successfully detects distributional shifts with short delays and restores both predictive accuracy and uncertainty quantification under abrupt and incremental drift. These results establish a statistically rigorous and computationally tractable pathway for sustaining the trustworthiness of neural-network--based Digital Twins throughout their operational life cycle.

</details>


### [481] [FlashRT: Agent Harness for Guiding Agents to Deploy Real-Time Multimodal Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18171)
*Krish Agarwal,Zhuoming Chen,Yanyuan Qin,Zhenyu Gu,Atri Rudra,Beidi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出FlashRT，一个通过编码智能体自动将参考实现转化为多GPU优化部署的系统，跨不同硬件（NVIDIA B200和AMD MI355X）实现高达70倍延迟降低和3.6倍吞吐量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有服务系统和自动并行编译器的转换能力有限且依赖固定工作负载假设，导致新应用场景下需要手动构建高效部署，缺乏自动化优化手段。

Method: 采用"链式编程"范式，通过编码智能体对参考实现进行多轮转换：先转化为中间表示（IR）捕获数据依赖和持久状态，通过顺序解释器验证，进行静态分析识别候选变换，然后迭代实现、验证和基准测试，在测量驱动的优化循环中生成高效部署。

Result: 在NVIDIA B200上实现高达70倍延迟降低和2.8倍吞吐量提升；在AMD MI355X上延迟降低持平，吞吐量提升达3.6倍；在Qwen3-Omni文转音频推理中比专家vLLM-Omni实现降低65%响应延迟。

Conclusion: 基于智能体的优化方法能够在更少专家优化的平台上实现更好的可扩展性，证明了自动化部署优化的有效性。

Abstract: Real-time multimodal applications, including voice agents and interactive video generation, compose heterogeneous models into pipelines whose efficient deployment requires application-specific decisions about placement, streaming, and intra-model parallelism. Existing serving systems and auto-parallelism compilers commit to limited transformations and fixed workload assumptions, so achieving high performance on a new application requires hand-crafting an efficient implementation. We present FlashRT, an agent harness that guides coding agents to lift simple developer-written reference implementations into optimized multi-GPU deployments that flexibly weigh target metrics like latency and throughput. Using a new chain-of-program paradigm, FlashRT directs a generic coding agent through a multi-pass transformation process where an agent transforms the reference into an intermediate representation (IR) to capture data dependencies and persistent-state scopes, validates this IR via a sequential interpreter, and performs static analyses to identify candidate transformations. Then, the agent iteratively implements, verifies, and benchmarks each candidate under a measurement-gated optimization loop to produce effective deployments that span different hardware budgets. Across various applications, including video world models and multimodal LLMs, FlashRT converts reference implementations into highly efficient deployments, delivering up to ~70x latency reduction and 2.8x throughput improvement on NVIDIA B200 GPUs. On AMD MI355X GPUs, FlashRT matches the peak latency reduction while increasing peak throughput improvement to 3.6x, demonstrating that agent-driven optimization can be more scalable on platforms with less mature expert optimization. In fact, for Qwen3-Omni text-to-audio inference, FlashRT reduces response latency by 65% compared to the expert vLLM-Omni implementation on AMD MI355X.

</details>


### [482] [Three-Body Scattering for Generative Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18198)
*Peng Sun,Zhenglin Cheng,Deyuan Liu,Jun Xie,Xinyi Shang,Tao Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出三体散射建模（TBSM），利用分布能量为单步生成器提供样本级回归监督，在ImageNet-256上分别使用PixelDiT-XL和DiT-XL取得FID 2.23和1.63的优异结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型依赖对抗判别器、预设噪声-数据路径或自回归分解，作者希望探索一种通过分布能量直接为单步生成器提供样本级运动诱导和回归监督的新方法。

Method: TBSM将能量距离转化为每个弹丸与一个真实源和一个生成源之间的恒定大小交互作用，形成三体散射结构。通过条件期望追踪2-Wasserstein梯度流速度，实现批量中O(B)个样本级损失，避免全对偶场计算。

Result: 在ImageNet-256上，像素空间PixelDiT-XL达到FID 2.23，潜空间DiT-XL达到FID 1.63（NFE=1），并建立了扩散监督、Drift动力学和GAN目标之间的设计映射。

Conclusion: 追踪散射策略为高维单步生成提供了一条有效路径，证明了基于分布能量的样本级训练框架的可行性。

Abstract: Modern generative models typically rely on an adversarial critic, a prescribed noise-to-data path, or an autoregressive factorization. Instead, we show that a proper distributional energy can induce sample-level motion and provide direct regression supervision for a one-step generator. Three-Body Scattering Modeling (TBSM) for generation turns the energy distance into a constant-size per-projectile interaction: each projectile is attracted toward one real source and repelled from one independently generated source. Conditioned on the projectile and its condition, its expectation equals the $2$-Wasserstein gradient-flow velocity of $\frac12D_E^2(P_θ,Q)$. A batch of $B$ frozen-target events yields $O(B)$ sample-level losses, each using one reference for its condition instead of the minibatch-wide all-pairs field used by methods such as Drifting Models. Tracking this conditional expectation online can reduce field noise. Using scattering in frozen image features, TBSM trains one-step generators on ImageNet-256, achieving FID${}=2.23$ with pixel-space PixelDiT-XL and FID${}=1.63$ with latent-space DiT-XL at NFE${}=1$. We provide a design map relating diffusion-related supervision, Drift-like dynamics, and GAN-like objectives. These results establish tracked scattering as a route to high-dimensional one-step generation. Code: https://github.com/sp12138/TBSM.

</details>


### [483] [Causal Discovery on Irregular Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18226)
*Martim Penim,Ricardo Ribeiro Pereira,Jacopo Bono,Hugo Ferreira,Mário A. T. Figueiredo,Pedro Bizarro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PCMCI+的扩展方法，通过聚合时间窗口内的因果影响来处理不规则时间序列数据，实验证明该方法在不规则采样数据上显著优于标准PCMCI+。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法（如PCMCI+）主要适用于规则采样的离散滞后结构数据，但现实中的传感器流、医疗数据和金融交易等场景常常是不规则采样的事件流，亟需能处理不规则时间序列的因果发现方法。

Method: 提出PCMCI+的扩展版本，不再使用固定滞后依赖来建模因果关系，而是通过预定义时间窗口内聚合因果影响的方式来处理不规则时间序列数据。

Result: 在具有已知因果结构的合成不规则事件流上，在不同信噪比条件下进行实验，所提方法能够一致地恢复底层因果图，并且在不规则采样数据上显著优于标准PCMCI+。

Conclusion: 该方法有效扩展了PCMCI+的适用性，使其能够处理不规则采样数据，为实际应用中的因果发现提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Causal discovery methods have shown strong performance in temporal systems, but they typically rely on regular and discrete lag structures, limiting their applicability to regularly sampled data. However, many real-world tasks require dealing with irregularly sampled streams of events, such as sensor streams, healthcare data, and financial transactions. In this work, we propose an extension of PCMCI+, a state-of-the-art method for causal discovery on regular multivariate time series, to allow for handling irregular time series. Instead of modelling causal relations through fixed-lag dependencies, our method aggregates causal influence over predefined temporal windows. We evaluate our method on synthetic irregular event streams with known causal structures under different signal-to-noise ratios, showing that it consistently recovers the underlying causal graph and substantially outperforms the standard PCMCI+ on irregularly sampled data.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [484] [HyperDCM: Dynamic Cluster Memory Replay in Hyperbolic Space for Continual Robotic Navigation Across Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16267)
*Zhengfei Lu,Jian Yang,Muyu Wang,Shaowen Chen,Jinpeng Mi,Ke Li,Xiong You,Qi Wu,Xuan Tang,Xian Wei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出超双曲动态聚类记忆（HyperDCM），通过场景图建模和结构化记忆重放增强扩散策略导航，在持续学习中缓解灾难性遗忘并提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉导航中的持续学习面临灾难性遗忘和适应多样化环境困难的问题。

Method: 利用大视觉语言模型提取语义场景三元组，经R-GCN编码为场景图嵌入并投影到双曲空间；采用动态聚类和结构敏感更新策略选择代表性样本进行记忆重放。

Result: 在多场景室内外数据集上，HyperDCM在保留过去导航能力和泛化性方面优于现有持续学习基线。

Conclusion: HyperDCM通过结构感知的记忆机制有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，提升了持续视觉导航的性能。

Abstract: Continual learning in visual navigation remains challenging due to catastrophic forgetting and the difficulties associated with adapting to diverse and evolving environments. To address these issues, we propose Hyperbolic Dynamic Cluster Memory (HyperDCM), a structure-aware memory mechanism that enhances diffusion policy-based navigation through scene graph modeling and principled memory replay. HyperDCM extracts semantic scene triples from RGB observations using large vision-language models, encodes them into scene graph embeddings via a Relational Graph Convolutional Network (R-GCN), and projects the embeddings into hyperbolic space to enhance structural separability and retention in continual navigation. A dynamic clustering and structure-sensitive update strategy selects representative samples for memory replay, thereby preserving knowledge diversity and mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Experiments on multi-scene indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that HyperDCM achieves superior retention of past navigation capabilities and improved generalization compared to representative continual learning baselines adapted to diffusion policy navigation.

</details>


### [485] [Control Design for a Rideable Animatronic Two-Wheeled Robot with Quadruped Form](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16302)
*Tadashi Sumioka,Kazushi Akimoto,Takuya Tsujimura,Sho Takayanagi,Yuya Horiuchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种带有四肢的骑乘式双轮自平衡机器人，旨在通过轮式 locomotion 实现稳定移动，同时四肢辅助上下车并配合运动，以实现自然四足步态和角色还原。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 摩托车在年轻人中受欢迎程度下降，为重新激发兴趣，作者开发了一款未来伙伴移动概念——可骑乘的双轮机器人，具有动态四足步态和丰富的肢体/面部表达。

Method: 机器人以自平衡双轮底盘为主动移动方式，四肢用于上下车辅助和随动协调运动；采用鲁棒自平衡控制方法应对快速肢体动作，同时使用运动控制策略生成自然的四足类行为。

Result: 实现了满足角色规格的体重和尺寸，保障骑手安全，能进行肢体、腕、踝和面部表达动作；解决纯腿式运动导致的电机负载大、速度慢、重量高的问题。

Conclusion: 该机器人能实现基于重心移动的直观操控和自由自然运动，是一种富有表现力的动画角色机器人平台。

Abstract: In recent years, motorcycle popularity has been declining, particularly among the younger generations. To rekindle interest in motorcycles among this demographic, we developed a rideable two-wheeled robot equipped with four limbs as a future partner mobility concept and intended for use in public events. The character reproduced by this robot carries the protagonist on its back and exhibits a dynamic quadrupedal gait. To maximize the riding experience, we aimed to match the robot's weight and size to the character's specifications while ensuring rider safety and enabling expressive movements of limbs, wrists, ankles, and facial features. However, achieving locomotion solely through limb movement would require excessive motor output and increased limb strength, resulting in higher weight and extremely slow gait, thereby reducing character fidelity. To overcome these challenges, the robot performs its primary locomotion using a self-balancing two-wheeled base, while the limbs provide auxiliary support during mounting and dismounting and move in coordination with the wheeled locomotion speed. This approach enables an animatronic robot capable of intuitive, weight-shift-based control for free and natural movement. In this paper, we focus on a robust selfbalancing control method that maintains stability even during rapid limb movements, as well as a motion control strategy that generates natural quadruped-like behavior.

</details>


### [486] [Real-Time sEMG-Based Telecontrol of an Assistive Robotic Arm Using a 1D Convolutional Neural Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16310)
*Edgar Manacorda,Mena Samir Kama Abouseffien,Olivier Lecompte,Amandine Gesta,Abolfazl Mohebbi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于表面肌电信号(sEMG)和卷积神经网络(CNN)的实时接口，用于辅助机器人手臂的遥操作，在模拟和真实环境中均实现了90%以上的分类准确率和约0.32秒的低延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 上肢运动障碍严重影响日常生活的自主性，尤其是在物体操作任务中。辅助机器人手臂需要直观、可靠且响应迅速的控制方式，而表面肌电信号(sEMG)能非侵入式地获取用户运动意图，因此本研究旨在开发一种基于sEMG的实时控制接口。

Method: 方法包括四通道sEMG采集、信号预处理、滑动窗口分割，以及使用一维卷积神经网络(CNN)进行分类。研究了多种实时策略：基于阈值的运动起始检测、两阶段分类（先区分静止与运动，再识别手势）、以及同时处理静止和五种手势的单分类器。系统在模拟和真实机器人平台上进行了评估。

Result: CNN方法测试准确率超过90%，对实验采集信号具有良好的泛化能力。实时系统平均延迟约0.32秒，与窗口策略一致。机器人在模拟和真实环境中均可通过离散手势实现稳定、连贯且平滑的控制。

Conclusion: 研究证明了基于sEMG的辅助机器人遥操作的可行性，强调了将信号处理、深度学习与控制策略整合到统一实时框架中的重要性。未来工作可探索结合sEMG与其他感知模式的混合控制方法，以进一步提升鲁棒性和可用性。

Abstract: Motor impairments affecting the upper limb significantly reduce autonomy in daily activities, particularly for tasks involving object manipulation. Assistive robotic arms offer a promising solution, provided they can be controlled in an intuitive, reliable, and responsive manner. Among human--machine interface approaches, surface electromyography (sEMG) enables non-invasive access to muscle activity and thus to the user's motor intentions. This work proposes a real-time sEMG-based interface for the teleoperation of an assistive robotic arm. The system relies on four-channel sEMG acquisition, signal preprocessing, segmentation into sliding windows, and classification using a one-dimensional convolutional neural network (CNN). Several real-time strategies are investigated, including threshold-based onset detection, a two-stage classification approach (rest vs movement followed by gesture recognition), and a single classifier handling both rest and five gestures. The complete pipeline is implemented and evaluated both in simulation and on a real robotic platform. The CNN-based approach achieves high classification performance, with a test accuracy above 90\% and strong generalization on experimentally acquired signals. The system exhibits stable real-time behavior, with an average latency of approximately 0.32 s consistent with the chosen windowing strategy, and the robot can be controlled reliably using discrete gestures, producing coherent and smooth movements in both simulated and real environments. These findings demonstrate the feasibility of sEMG-based telecontrol for assistive robotics and highlight the importance of integrating signal processing, deep learning, and control strategies within a unified real-time framework. Future work may explore hybrid control approaches combining sEMG with additional sensing modalities to further improve robustness and usability.

</details>


### [487] [S.E.A.G.R: A Socially and Emotionally Aware Greeting Robot Framework with Dual-Layer Cultural and Affective Modulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16341)
*Sajjad Hussain,Ranveer Bhura,Amandip Dutta,Shwetangshu Biswas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出SEAGR（社交情感感知问候机器人）框架，通过双层调节机制融合文化身份与情感状态，实现机器人在公共空间中自适应、文化适配的问候行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人问候系统多采用静态模式，未能考虑文化差异、情感语境和人际距离，导致社交不适与信任缺失。

Method: 构建双层调节框架：文化身份决定问候类型，情感提示调节执行方式。集成情境文化映射、基于情感的手势调节和空间距离管理，采用Sense-Think-Act架构，以低成本原型验证。

Result: 完成系统设计与概念验证原型（USB摄像头、超声波传感器、Arduino舵机、Python处理），但缺乏实证用户研究作为当前局限。

Conclusion: SEAGR为跨文化、多情感场景下的人机问候提供了新思路，未来需通过用户实验验证其社交有效性与用户体验。

Abstract: This paper presents SEAGR (Socially and Emotionally Aware Greeting Robot), a robotic greeting framework designed for human-robot interaction environments involving users from diverse cultural backgrounds and different emotional states. Since greeting behaviour strongly influences first impressions, user comfort, and trust, robots operating in public spaces must be able to interact in a socially appropriate and adaptive manner. However, many existing systems still rely on static greeting routines that do not account for cultural variation, emotional context, or interpersonal distance. SEAGR introduces a dual-layer modulation framework in which cultural identity determines the appropriate greeting type, while affective cues influence how that greeting is executed. The system combines context-aware cultural mapping, emotion-based gesture modulation, and proxemic regulation within a unified Sense-Think-Act architecture. A low-cost prototype is implemented using a USB camera, ultrasonic sensor, Arduino-controlled servos, and a laptop-based Python processing system. This work is presented as a system design and proof-of-concept; empirical validation through user studies is explicitly acknowledged as a current limitation and is identified as the primary direction for future work.

</details>


### [488] [PRISM: Multimodal Terrain Mapping for Rover Navigation in Unstructured Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16366)
*Raul Castilla-Arquillo,Carlos Perez-del-Pulgar,Levin Gerdes,Alfonso Garcia-Cerezo,Miguel A. Olivares-Mendez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了PRISM多模态感知系统，通过融合RGB、深度和热成像数据，并采用基于视觉Transformer的OmniUnet网络进行语义地形分割，在资源受限的嵌入式平台上实现了非结构化环境中的可通行性地图生成与自主导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非结构化环境中的机器人导航需要强大的态势感知能力来安全穿越陡坡和岩石地形等障碍，而现有感知系统在复杂地形下的可靠性不足。

Method: 设计了PRISM多模态感知系统，集成定制传感器套件获取对齐的RGB-D-T图像；提出OmniUnet网络（基于视觉Transformer）进行多模态语义地形分割；在BASEPROD和LAENTIEC两个新标注数据集上验证，并在资源受限的嵌入式计算机上部署。

Result: 通过两个新数据集验证和实际物理场实验，证明了PRISM系统在真实场景中的有效性，能高效生成可通行性地图。

Conclusion: PRISM系统通过多模态融合和轻量化设计，可直接为机器人的制导、导航与控制子系统提供可通行性地图，实现非结构化环境中的自主导航。

Abstract: Robotic navigation in unstructured environments requires robust situational awareness to safely traverse hazards such as steep slopes and rocky terrain. To address this challenge, perception systems increasingly rely on multimodal sensor fusion. Specifically, integrating thermal imagery with standard optical and depth sensors enhances terrain differentiation, directly improving the reliability of mapping algorithms. This paper presents PRISM, a multimodal perception system for terrain mapping in unstructured settings. PRISM leverages a custom sensor suite to capture aligned RGB, depth, and thermal (RGB-D-T) imagery. At its core is OmniUnet, a novel vision transformer-based network specifically designed for multimodal semantic terrain segmentation. We validated the proposed system using two newly annotated datasets (BASEPROD and LAENTIEC) and demonstrate its real-world applicability through physical field experiments. Deployed on a resource-constrained embedded computer, PRISM efficiently generates traversability maps that directly enable autonomous navigation via a rover's Guidance, Navigation, and Control (GNC) subsystem.

</details>


### [489] [Back to the museum: Investigation of the acceptance of Android Andrea with and without emotion simulation in a museum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16428)
*Marcel Heisler,Christian Becker-Asano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 德国博物馆中，安卓机器人Andrea在六天内自主与游客进行多语言对话。研究测试了三种情绪模拟条件（无情绪、ChatGPT 4.1驱动、WASABI架构驱动），通过73名游客的问卷反馈发现，前两种情绪实现方式未对游客主观评价产生积极影响，且未在意识层面被察觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在自主对话机器人中实现情绪模拟是否能提升用户体验，验证不同情绪生成方法（大模型驱动 vs. 专用情绪架构）的实际效果。

Method: 在博物馆部署安卓机器人Andrea，实现多语言自主对话。设置三种实验条件：无情绪、ChatGPT 4.1决定情绪、WASABI情绪模拟架构。使用扩展版TAM2问卷收集73名游客的主观评价。

Result: 两种情绪实现方式（ChatGPT 4.1和WASABI）均未对游客的主观评价产生统计上显著的积极影响，且游客无法在意识层面察觉情绪的存在。

Conclusion: 当前的情绪模拟方法未能提升用户对安卓机器人的评价，需要探索更有效的情绪表达策略。

Abstract: For a second time, the android robot Andrea was set up at a public museum in Germany for six consecutive days to have conversations with visitors, fully autonomously. Building on previously gathered qualitative results, the robot was now capable of engaging in multi-lingual conversation with the visitors about the museum context. The robot was prepared with context information about the museum in general and its surrounding exhibits this time. The robot featured a slightly artificial sounding voice that was previously evaluated as congruent with its gender-ambiguous but very humanlike design. Three experimental conditions were implemented, in which either (1) the robot simulated no emotions, (2) the robots emotions were determined by ChatGPT 4.1, or (3) the WASABI emotion simulation architecture simulated the robot's emotion dynamics. An extended version of the TAM2 questionnaire was employed to let 73 visitors report on several factors of their opinion about the android robot Andrea after having experienced it. In result, the statistical analysis suggests that these first two approaches to implementing emotions into the chat architecture of our android robot Andrea did not yield any positive effects on the subjective evaluations by the visitors and were not detectable on a conscious level.

</details>


### [490] [Linear Stability Analysis of an INDI Pitch-Rate Controller under Model Mismatch for a Tilt-Rotor VTOL UAV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16471)
*Lorenzo Schenk,Guillaume Ducard,Christopher Onder*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对倾转旋翼垂直起降飞行器，分析了增量非线性动态逆（INDI）控制器在模型失配下的线性稳定性，提出了两种不确定性感知的调参方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有INDI控制器的快速内环可接受的模型失配范围缺乏显式参数化的解析刻画。

Method: 隔离级联INDI控制器的俯仰角速度/升降副翼子通道，推导闭环五阶传递函数，利用Routh-Hurwitz判据进行线性稳定性分析，并通过参数扫描生成可解释的稳定区域图。

Result: 控制效能失配（尤其是分配符号错误）是最危险的失稳因素；执行器延迟和惯性失配在标称增益下相对温和。

Conclusion: 提出了鲁棒性导向和性能导向两种调参流程，给出了保守与激进工况下的具体调参建议。

Abstract: Incremental Nonlinear Dynamic Inversion (INDI) is attractive for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) flight control because it reduces dependence on a full aerodynamic model while retaining strong disturbance-rejection capability. For a tilt-rotor vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) architecture, however, the admissible model-mismatch range of the fast inner loop is still not characterized analytically in a parameter-explicit way. This paper isolates the pitch-rate/elevon subchannel of an existing cascaded INDI controller and studies its linear stability under model mismatch. A closed-form fifth-order transfer function is derived for the full controller-estimator-actuator-plant interconnection, and stability is characterized through the Routh-Hurwitz criterion over a parameterized linear model. Two representative three-parameter sweeps produce interpretable stability regions. Based on these feasibility maps, two uncertainty-aware tuning procedures are proposed: a robustness-oriented design that maximizes a weighted worst-case combination of gain margin and phase margin, and a performance-oriented design that maximizes worst-case closed-loop bandwidth subject to margin constraints. The results show that actuator lag and inertia mismatch are comparatively benign at nominal gain, whereas control-effectiveness mismatch, particularly a sign error in the allocation, is the most dangerous destabilizing factor, leading to concrete tuning recommendations for conservative and aggressive operating conditions.

</details>


### [491] [Certifiable Safe Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with Control-Affine Dynamics Approximation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16501)
*Hao Zhou,Yanze Zhang,Cameron Reid,Wenhao Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于控制屏障函数的控制仿射型安全强化学习框架，通过控制仿射随机傅里叶特征建模动力学，并利用自适应保形预测量化不确定性，在车杆和3D四旋翼平台上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法忽略了残差模型不确定性的结构（如控制仿射分量），导致行为过于保守或安全保证失效。

Method: 1) 使用控制仿射随机傅里叶特征(ARFF)建模控制仿射形式的机器人动力学；2) 采用自适应保形预测(ACP)进行无模型不确定性量化；3) 结合控制屏障函数(CBF)合成可认证的数据驱动安全策略。

Result: 在车杆系统和3D四旋翼平台上通过仿真验证了所提框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过显式考虑残差不确定性的控制仿射结构，实现了计算效率高且保守性低的安全强化学习。

Abstract: Safe model-based reinforcement learning (RL) often bridges control-theoretic analysis and RL for robots to safely explore (partially) unknown system dynamics while deriving control actions for task efficiency. The control performance and safety assurance typically rely on prior knowledge of partially modeled nominal system dynamics and the data-driven models that compensate for residual model uncertainties. However, existing methods often overlook the structure of residual model uncertainties (e.g., components affine in control), which could lead to overly conservative robot behaviors or invalid safety guarantees under the safe learning-based controllers. This paper proposes a safe reinforcement learning framework that learns control-affine dynamics with a certifiable data-driven safe policy using control barrier functions (CBF). Specifically, we first use Control-Affine Random Fourier Features (ARFF) to model robot dynamics in a control-affine form, which offers computational efficiency that scales with dataset size and reduces potential model bias for model-based reinforcement learning. Then, a model-free, efficient uncertainty quantification method using adaptive conformal prediction (ACP) is applied to quantify the uncertainty in the safety constraint arising from the learned control-affine dynamics. This allows for data-driven safety assurance amenable to principled and efficient controller synthesis with CBF. Simulation results on the cartpole and the 3D quadrotor platforms demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [492] [Foresight Residual RL for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation with Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16506)
*Yuhan Liu,Xinyu Zhang,Litao Liu,Abdeslam Boularias*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出前瞻性残差强化学习（Foresight Residual RL），通过在子任务奖励中引入基于离线估计的前瞻价值（下游任务成功概率），显著提升了VLA策略在装配任务中的长程成功率（85.6%），远超标准残差RL（54.5%）和VLA基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA策略在精密装配任务中因长期信用分配和子任务耦合导致失败——当前技能的成功状态对下游技能可能是脆弱的，而标准残差RL仅优化各子任务局部成功率却未控制终端状态质量，导致链条任务无增益。

Method: (i) 基于基础策略终端状态的图像训练视觉前瞻预测器，用下游 rollout 统计标签；(ii) 通过后向前瞻归纳训练残差策略，将预测器输出作为奖励乘数。

Result: 在三阶段螺母拧紧装配任务中，全任务成功率达85.6%，显著优于标准子任务残差RL（54.5%）和VLA基线，且各子任务成功率不变。

Conclusion: 提升长程性能的关键在于塑造每个子任务产生的成功状态质量，而不仅仅是是否达成成功。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies offer strong general-purpose manipulation priors, but often fail on tight-tolerance, contact-rich assembly due to long-horizon credit assignment and subtask coupling: a state that is geometrically successful for the current skill can be brittle for downstream skills. We show this failure mode in residual reinforcement learning (RL) over a frozen VLA base policy: constant sparse success rewards improve each subtask in isolation yet yield little or no gain when skills are chained, because terminal state quality is uncontrolled. We propose Foresight Residual RL, which optimizes handoff quality by augmenting each subtask's sparse success reward with an offline-estimated foresight value -- the probability of future subtask success conditioned on the terminal state of the current subtask. Concretely, we (i) train a visual foresight predictor from images of terminal states of the base policy, labeled using downstream rollout statistics, and (ii) train residual policies via backward foresight induction, using the predictor output as a reward multiplier. On a three-phase wrench-based nut-tightening assembly task in Isaac Gym (grasp, move-insert, rotate), our method achieves 85.6% full-task success, outperforming standard subtask residual RL (54.5%) and VLA baselines, while leaving per-subtask success unchanged. These results highlight that improving long-horizon performance requires shaping which successful states are produced at each sub-task, not only whether success occurs.

</details>


### [493] [Differentiable Reinforcement Learning for Path Tracking by an Agile Fish-Like Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16508)
*Prashanth Chivkula,Kartik Loya,Venkata Ravindhra Reddy Varikuti,Phanindra Tallapragada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文开发了一个高效仿真平台，结合PID控制与反向传播时间训练算法，实现了仿生鱼机器人的运动控制和路径跟踪，并将仿真策略成功迁移至物理平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿生鱼机器人由于流固耦合建模困难和非线性欠驱动特性，控制和运动规划极具挑战；同时缺乏兼具速度和精度的仿真环境，阻碍了强化学习在该领域的应用。

Method: 开发了一个计算高效的仿真平台模拟鱼形机器人运动，采用PID控制进行运动控制和路径跟踪，通过反向传播时间（BPTT）和课程学习来训练可变增益参数。

Result: 仿真环境中学习的控制策略成功迁移到物理平台上，且仿真与实际表现出极好的一致性。

Conclusion: 所提出的仿真平台结合PID增益学习方法能够有效解决仿生鱼机器人的运动控制问题，并具备良好的仿真到现实迁移能力。

Abstract: Fish-like swimming has inspired the design of several dozens if not hundreds of bioinspired robots in the last few decades. But the control and motion planning of such robots has been challenging due to the poorly modeled fluid-structure interaction and the nonlinear underactuated dynamics of such robots. While reinforcement learning has allowed significant advances in the context of ground and aerial robots, the lack of a suitable simulation environment with appropriate computational speed and accuracy have prevented similar progress for fish-like robots. We address this two-fold problem by developing a simulation platform that approximates the motion of our fish-like robot with computational efficiency. Then the motion control and path tracking by the robot is performed using PID control where the (variable) gains are learned using back propagation through time and training on a curriculum. The policy learned in the simulation is then applied on the physical platform, demonstrating an excellent match.

</details>


### [494] [Autonomous VR-Based Risk Detection for Situational Awareness in Dangerous Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16582)
*Mohammad Eskandari,Murali Krishna Varma Indukuri,Stephanie M. Lukin,Cynthia Matuszek*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于VR的具身智能框架，让配备视觉语言模型的机器人探索危险环境并标注风险点，通过沉浸式VR界面将信息传达给人类操作员。实验表明，带注释的VR界面相比无注释基线更受用户青睐，参与者对系统的清晰度、实用性和舒适度评价较高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在灾难响应等高风险环境中，态势感知不仅依赖检测危险，还需将其清晰传达给人类操作员。VLM在安全关键场景中的场景理解能力虽强，但作为人类面对机器人系统的一部分的价值尚未充分探索。

Method: 构建VR人机交互框架，机器人探索虚拟场景并通过VLM识别潜在危险、标注兴趣点，最终通过沉浸式VR界面呈现给操作员。

Result: 用户更偏好带注释的VR界面；参与者对系统交互的清晰度、实用性和舒适度评分较高。

Conclusion: 将VLM驱动的机器人感知与沉浸式可视化结合，是支持危险环境中态势感知的有效途径。

Abstract: In high-risk environments such as disaster response, situational awareness depends not only on detecting hazards but also on communicating them clearly to human operators. Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for scene understanding in safety-critical settings, yet their value as part of human-facing robotic systems remains underexplored. We present a VR-based Human Robot Interaction framework for studying how VLM-assisted robots can support situational awareness in simulated hazardous environments. In our system, a robot explores a virtual scene and queries a VLM to identify potential hazards and annotate user-facing points of interest. These annotations are presented to a human operator through an immersive VR interface. This framework enables controlled evaluation of both robotic hazard identification and the communication of safety-critical information to users. Results from our study indicate that the annotated VR interface was preferred over the unannotated baseline and that participants reported high clarity, usefulness, and comfort when interacting with the system. These findings suggest that combining VLM-based robotic perception with immersive visualization is a promising approach for supporting situational awareness in hazardous settings.

</details>


### [495] [An Indoor Navigation System for the Visually Impaired based on UWB Positioning and D* Lite Path Planning Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16614)
*Thanh C. Vo,Dong LT. Tran,Huy HM. Le,Duyen N Ha,Tuan Anh Pham,Hai Thanh Dang,Hoang T. Tran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于UWB定位与D*Lite路径规划算法的室内导航系统，专为视障人士设计，能在无GPS环境下实现精准定位与动态避障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内导航系统在GPS缺失环境下精度不足，且难以应对动态障碍物，无法满足视障人士对安全、实时导航的需求。

Method: 采用UWB传感器实现高精度室内定位，结合D*Lite算法进行路径规划与动态重规划，以适应环境变化。

Result: 实验表明，系统在复杂室内空间中运行可靠，延迟低，能为用户提供安全灵活的导航体验。

Conclusion: 该方案有效解决了视障人士在室内环境中的导航难题，具有实际应用价值和推广潜力。

Abstract: This paper proposes an indoor navigation system for the visually impaired, leveraging Ultra-Wideband (UWB) positioning technology and the D*Lite path planning algorithm. The system utilizes UWB sensors to provide precision localization in GPS-denied environments. The D* Lite algorithm is integrated to optimize travel trajectories and ensure rapid route re-planning in the presence of dynamic obstacles. Experimental results demonstrate that the system operates reliably with low latency, providing safety and flexibility for users in complex indoor spaces.

</details>


### [496] [SAGE: A Socially-Aware Generative Engine for Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16619)
*Lan Hu,Minghui Liwang,Wenbo Zhu,Xinlei Yi,Yiguang Hong,Xianbin Wang,Zhenzhen Jiao,Seyyedali Hosseinalipour*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出SAGE框架，利用异构图Transformer和扩散生成模块实现异构多智能体(含人和机器人)的安全、社交合规导航，并通过无训练的能量引导机制优化轨迹采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以联合建模异构参与者之间的非对称交互、耦合的预测-规划过程以及软性社交规范约束。

Method: 构建有向异构图表示机器人与周围实体，使用异构图Transformer编码类型特定的非对称交互；基于扩散模型联合生成未来实体轨迹与机器人规划；推理时通过无训练的安全-社交能量引导机制优化轨迹。

Result: 在ETH/UCY、SDD及合成数据集上验证了有效性，显著降低碰撞和社交违规率，可扩展到20个机器人团队，并能显式控制安全-精度-任务权衡。

Conclusion: SAGE是一个可扩展的社交感知多智能体导航框架，能有效处理异构交互并兼顾安全、社交合规与任务性能。

Abstract: Safe and socially compliant navigation in open human-robot environments requires robots to reason about heterogeneous participants with different dynamics, autonomy levels, and social roles. Existing trajectory prediction and planning methods often rely on homogeneous interaction assumptions or enforce only geometric collision constraints, making it difficult to jointly model asymmetric interactions, coupled prediction-planning, and soft social norms. This paper proposes SAGE, a socially-aware generative engine for heterogeneous multi-agent navigation. SAGE represents robots and surrounding entities as a directed heterogeneous graph and employs a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer (HGT) to encode type-specific asymmetric interactions. Conditioned on the resulting context, a diffusion-based generative module jointly models future entity trajectories and robot trajectory plans. During inference, a training-free safety-social energy guidance mechanism refines sampled robot trajectories using differentiable collision, kinematic, task-progress, and role-conditioned social-compliance terms. Extensive experiments on real-world (ETH/UCY and SDD) and synthetic datasets verify the effectiveness of SAGE in improving safety and social compliance while maintaining task performance. The proposed guidance mechanism consistently reduces collision and social-violation rates, scales to teams of up to 20 robots, and enables explicit control of the safety-accuracy-task trade-off without retraining. These findings demonstrate the potential of SAGE as a scalable framework for socially-aware multi-agent navigation in complex environments.

</details>


### [497] [AI-Augmented Model Predictive Control for Safe and Adaptive Rendezvous and Proximity Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16630)
*Luca Sportelli,Tyler Barr,Cagri Kilic,Di Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应模型预测控制（MPC）框架，用于航天器在对抗性多智能体环境中的自主交会与临近操作。该框架结合了约束MPC与数据驱动的监督调优层，通过离线闭环评估与在线交互几何调整控制器参数，在Kerbal Space Program微分博弈环境中验证，相比固定参数MPC提升了鲁棒性、自适应机动能力和交会性能，同时保持了安全性与实时可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在安全关键型轨道机器人应用中面临可解释性、鲁棒性和约束感知能力不足的问题，亟需一种在对抗性轨道环境中平衡目标追踪、安全保持与实时适应性的制导架构。

Method: 提出自适应MPC框架：底层采用基于Clohessy-Wiltshire动力学的约束滚动时域MPC，包含执行器限制、预测禁入区约束、松弛变量可行性处理及控制屏障函数安全滤波；上层为数据驱动监督调优层，通过离线闭环评估与在线交互几何调整MPC参数（跟踪权重、安全惩罚、最小分离目标等）。

Result: 在KSPDG Capture-the-Satellite环境中通过蒙特卡洛仿真验证，自适应MPC相比固定参数MPC展现出更优的闭环鲁棒性、自适应机动行为和交会性能，同时保持了安全感知操作与实时可行性。

Conclusion: 该工作为自适应航天器交会与临近操作提供了一个模块化、可解释的基础框架，在安全关键型轨道机器人领域具有良好应用前景。

Abstract: Autonomous rendezvous and proximity operations (RPO) in adversarial orbital environments require guidance architectures balancing target pursuit, safety preservation, and real-time adaptability under dynamically evolving interaction conditions. Although learning-based approaches show promise, their application to safety-critical orbital robotics remains limited by concerns regarding interpretability, robustness, and constraint awareness. This work presents an adaptive Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework for autonomous spacecraft RPO in multi-agent adversarial scenarios. The proposed architecture combines a constrained receding-horizon MPC formulation with a data-driven supervisory tuning layer that adjusts controller parameters from offline closed-loop evaluation and online interaction geometry. Relative motion follows Clohessy-Wiltshire (CW) dynamics, enabling computationally efficient finite-horizon prediction and real-time quadratic optimization. The MPC formulation incorporates actuator limits, predictive keep-out-zone constraints, slack-variable feasibility handling, and optional Control Barrier Function (CBF) safety filtering. Rather than generating thrust commands directly, the adaptive layer modifies interpretable MPC parameters, including tracking weights, safety penalties, minimum-separation objectives, and keep-out-zone objectives. The framework was evaluated in the official Kerbal Space Program Differential Game (KSPDG) Capture-the-Satellite environment through Monte Carlo simulations. Results demonstrate improved closed-loop robustness, adaptive maneuvering behavior, and rendezvous performance compared with fixed-parameter MPC while preserving safety-aware operation and real-time feasibility, providing a modular, interpretable foundation for adaptive spacecraft RPO.

</details>


### [498] [PhyAgentOS: A Self-Evolving Operating System for Embodied Agents with Decoupled Cognitive Planning and Physical Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16636)
*Yang Liu,Weixing Chen,Xinshuai Song,Tao Pu,Siwen Mo,Yongjie Bai,Zihao Chen,Qianran Sun,Liruo Zhong,Ying Shen,Liang Lin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PhyAgentOS 是一个运行时基础平台，为视觉-语言-动作模型、世界模型和智能体规划器提供统一的调度、验证、记忆、基准测试和安全性系统服务，通过会话中心运行时、状态即文件协议和会话验证器实现异构具身智能体的认知与物理执行解耦。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型、世界模型和智能体规划器在组合时缺乏共同的执行抽象、共享状态、语义验证机制以及跨异构具身形态的持久经验。

Method: 提出 PhyAgentOS 运行时基础平台，核心包括：(1) 会话中心运行时，将会话而非动作作为最小调度单元；(2) 状态即文件协议，通过 Markdown+YAML 格式实现跨层状态的可检查、可版本化记录；(3) 会话验证器，基于证据判断执行终止与语义任务完成的区别；(4) 认知记忆机制，将验证结果转化为可重用知识；以及分层安全体系。

Result: 在 Optimus-67、StarDojo、DST-Dojo 上完成基准测试，在 19+ 模拟和物理具身形态上验证，并在 LIBERO、Calvin、RoboCasa365 上跨多种 VLA 模型取得性能提升。

Conclusion: PhyAgentOS 通过系统级运行时服务有效解决了异构具身智能体系统的认知-物理解耦、状态统一、语义验证和持续学习问题，验证了其在多种场景和模型上的通用性和有效性。

Abstract: Vision-language-action models, world models, and agentic planners each advance physical intelligence, yet their composition lacks a common execution abstraction, shared state, semantic verification, and persistent experience across heterogeneous embodiments. We present PhyAgentOS, a runtime foundation delivering scheduling, verification, memory, benchmarking, and safety as system-level services. Its Session-Centered Runtime treats a session, not an action, as the minimum unit of scheduling, compatibility preflight, supervised execution, evidence collection, and acceptance. To decouple cognition from physical execution, the cognition-physics boundary is a file system: the State-as-a-File protocol materializes cross-layer state as Markdown with YAML, yielding inspectable, versionable records without code dependencies between Agent and Runtime layers. These views form a unified cognitive state space aligning intent, capabilities, environment, execution, and experience. The SessionVerifier distinguishes execution termination from semantic task completion via evidence-grounded verdicts of success, failure, or replan. Verified outcomes are consolidated through epistemic memory into reusable knowledge and corrective lessons, closing a trial-and-error loop without retraining. Benchmarking reuses the deployment session and verification path, so results trace to real execution. Layered safety constrains both policy-driven and agent-driven execution: preflight, action bridges, SafetyGuard, heartbeat monitoring, and target-local constraints. Validation is progressive: games test cognitive planning, simulation adds dynamics and control, real robots add hardware noise, with the cognitive layer held constant. PhyAgentOS is benchmarked on Optimus-67, StarDojo, and DST-Dojo, validated on 19+ simulated and physical embodiments, and gains on LIBERO, Calvin, and RoboCasa365 across multiple VLA models.

</details>


### [499] [Token-Wise Latent Streaming from Slow Reasoners to Fast Planners for Dynamic Vision Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16806)
*Tianshuai Hu,Yangyi Zhong,Zeying Gong,Lingdong Kong,Xiaodong Mei,Guoyang Zhao,Xiaolu Liu,Song Wang,Rong Li,Junwei Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SPARK-VLN提出了一种双系统框架，通过将慢速VLM推理过程中的中间隐藏状态流式传输给快速流匹配专家规划器，解决了动态社交VLN中语言推理缓慢与安全社交规划需要即时反应之间的矛盾，在保持推理效率的同时提升了导航成功率和社交合规性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态人类密集环境中的视觉-语言导航面临根本性矛盾：语言推理缓慢且需要深思熟虑，而安全、符合社交规范的规划需要即时反应。VLM推理过程中的观测过时会导致安全关键问题——推理时选择的动作在执行时可能已经不安全。

Method: 提出SPARK-VLN双系统框架，包含三个模块：1) Token-Wise Hidden Streamer，在token生成过程中提取中间隐藏状态；2) Sequence-to-Slot Latent Bridge，将隐藏状态投影为固定大小的潜在槽；3) Evolving Latent Conditioner，将潜在表示注入专家规划器。同时构建了动态社交VLN基准测试集。

Result: SPARK-VLN在动态社交导航场景中提升了导航成功率和社交合规性，同时保持了推理效率，减少了因观测过时导致的人类碰撞。

Conclusion: 通过在VLM推理完成前就将其中间意图传递给快速规划器，SPARK-VLN有效缓解了语言推理延迟与即时安全反应之间的矛盾，为动态社交导航提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Navigation in dynamic, human-centric environments exposes a fundamental tension: linguistic reasoning is slow and deliberative, whereas safe, socially compliant planning should be instant and reactive. The resulting observation staleness is safety-critical: a maneuver chosen during inference can already be unsafe by the time it executes. We observe that, long before a VLM finishes its inference, its intermediate hidden states already encode action-relevant intent. We propose SPARK-VLN, a dual-system framework for dynamic social VLN that streams the slow VLM reasoner's knowledge to a fast flow-matching expert planner throughout token generation, providing fresh and evolving guidance during inference. This design is realized by three modules: a Token-Wise Hidden Streamer that extracts intermediate hidden states along the token generation process, a Sequence-to-Slot Latent Bridge that projects them into fixed-size latent slots, and an Evolving Latent Conditioner that infuses them into the expert planner. We also introduce a human-centric benchmark suite for dynamic social vision-language navigation that keeps pedestrians and the robot active throughout inference and reports navigation success, social compliance, human collisions, and explicit staleness statistics. Across these settings, SPARK-VLN mproves navigation success and social compliance while sustaining inference efficiency. Webpage: https://hutslib.github.io/SPARK-VLN/.

</details>


### [500] [GLidE-SLAM: GL-Accelerated Indirect-Direct Embedded SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16897)
*Carlos A. Pinheiro de Sousa,Heiko Hamann,Oliver Deussen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GLidE-SLAM是一种面向嵌入式设备的单目混合间接-直接SLAM框架，通过GPU加速的直接跟踪与间接后端分离架构，在资源受限平台上实现高达9倍帧率提升，同时保持轨迹精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人、自主无人机和可穿戴扩展现实系统需求增长，在嵌入式设备上部署Visual SLAM仍面临挑战：跟踪需维持高帧率，同时保留计算资源用于地图扩展与维护。

Method: 提出混合间接-直接框架，采用架构分离：GPU加速直接跟踪处理中间帧（仅位姿估计，无需深度优化或地图点创建），完整间接管道负责地图扩展与全局一致性；使用OpenGL ES 3.1计算着色器实现与厂商无关的GPU直接跟踪器。

Result: 在目标平台上，相比纯CPU基线实现了高达9倍帧率提升，同时保持轨迹精度，改善了在资源受限硬件上的实际部署效果。

Conclusion: 这是首个通过计算着色器在嵌入式设备上实现的完整直接光度位姿估计器，证明了GPU分离架构在不依赖CUDA的情况下能显著提升嵌入式SLAM性能。

Abstract: With the growing demand for robotics, autonomous drones, and wearable extended reality systems, the deployment of Visual SLAM on embedded devices remains challenging. Tracking must sustain high frame rates while preserving compute resources for map extension and maintenance. This paper presents GLidE-SLAM, a monocular hybrid indirect-direct framework that addresses this by architectural separation: the system performs GPU-accelerated direct tracking on intermediate frames, while reserving the full indirect pipeline for map extension and global consistency. We leverage highly parallel image-alignment operations for pose-only estimation without depth optimization or map point creation, making the workload suitable for GPU offloading and freeing CPU resources for backend tasks. We implement the direct tracker using vendor-agnostic OpenGL ES~3.1 compute shaders, enabling deployment across a broader range of commodity embedded platforms without requiring CUDA support. To our knowledge, this is the first complete direct photometric pose estimator realized via compute shaders for embedded-class devices. Experiments on target platforms demonstrate up to 9$\times$ higher frame rates than the CPU-only baseline while maintaining trajectory accuracy and improving practical deployment across commodity resource-constrained hardware.

</details>


### [501] [Approximate Relative Entropy Constraints for Nonlinear Covariance Steering Under Distribution Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16914)
*Trevor N. Wolf,Jay W. McMahon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于相对熵（KL散度）的分布鲁棒协方差控制框架，用于处理非线性系统中概率密度函数传播的模糊性，并设计了一种序列凸规划算法来保持真实分布接近高斯代理，同时约束风险敏感性能指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 协方差控制在非线性系统中依赖局部线性化得到的高斯代理可能与真实非线性状态分布差异较大，导致碰撞概率、均方误差等风险敏感量估计不准确。

Method: 利用指数积分的变分表示推导KL散度模糊集上风险敏感量的可计算上界；建立真实非线性分布与高斯参考代理之间KL散度时间变化率的上界，并将其纳入协方差控制的决策变量中；通过序列凸规划算法求解。

Result: 在近直线晕轨道间的非线性航天器转移问题上验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提分布鲁棒协方差控制框架能够有效约束真实分布与高斯代理的偏差，同时保证风险敏感性能指标满足要求。

Abstract: Covariance steering provides an efficient framework for designing linear stochastic feedback policies, but its extension to nonlinear systems relies on a Gaussian surrogate obtained through local linearization. Because this surrogate may differ substantially from the true nonlinear state distribution, risk-sensitive quantities such as collision probability and mean-squared error may be inaccurately estimated. This work develops a distributionally robust covariance-steering framework based on the relative entropy, also known as the Kullback-Leibler divergence (KLD), to account for ambiguity in the propagated probability density function. Using a variational representation of exponential integrals, we derive computable upper bounds on risk-sensitive quantities over a KLD ambiguity set. We then formulate an upper bound on the time rate of change of the KLD between the true nonlinear distribution and a Gaussian reference surrogate. Under some assumptions, this bound is controlled by decision variables within a covariance-steering formulation. The resulting constraints are incorporated into a sequential convex programming algorithm to design stochastic guidance policies that keep the true distribution close to its Gaussian surrogate while enforcing bounds on risk-sensitive performance measures. The proposed approach is demonstrated on a challenging nonlinear spacecraft transfer between two near-rectilinear halo orbits.

</details>


### [502] [A BIM-enabled, Agent-based Discrete-event Simulation Platform for Robotic Studies: A Method based on Graph Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16920)
*Ping Xu,Xinghua Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于BIM的智能体仿真平台，通过将室内环境离散化为网格并映射为图节点，结合BIM的几何和语义信息，实现知识驱动的室内机器人导航与操作规划，仿真验证了其高效性和无碰撞导航能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有室内机器人导航方法（如SLAM）仅支持基本路径规划，无法提供建筑构件的位置、几何、材质等丰富信息，难以满足复杂设施管理任务（如定位和修复漏水管线）的需求。

Method: 将室内环境离散化为网格单元，映射为图节点并分类（目标、障碍物、常规节点）；根据与建筑元素的空间关系定义边代价，利用图算法计算无碰撞最优路径；通过网格细化解决粗粒度离散化导致的节点重叠问题。

Result: 所提出的图表示方法实现了高效无碰撞导航；识别并缓解了粗粒度离散化中目标与障碍物节点重叠的关键局限，网格细化提升了空间准确性和路径可行性。

Conclusion: 该平台支持机器人在部署前的虚拟评估，为BIM驱动的设施管理机器人系统奠定了基础。

Abstract: Indoor robots are increasingly employed for facility management tasks such as cleaning and inspection. These applications primarily rely on navigation and can be effectively supported by predefined routes or perception-driven Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) techniques. However, more complex tasks, such as locating and repairing leaking pipes, require not only navigation but also access to building information, including the location, geometry, material, and operational attributes of components. Existing navigation approaches provide only limited environmental understanding and cannot readily supply such information. In contrast, Building Information Modeling (BIM) contains rich geometric, semantic, and operational information that remains largely underutilized in robotic applications. This study proposes a BIM-enabled, agent-based simulation platform for knowledge-driven indoor robot navigation and operation planning. Within the framework, indoor environments are discretized into grid cells that are mapped to graph nodes and classified as target, obstacle, or regular nodes according to their spatial relationships with building elements. Traversal costs are assigned to edges connecting neighboring nodes, enabling graph-theoretic algorithms to compute efficient and collision-free navigation paths while avoiding obstacles. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed graph representation enables efficient and collision-free navigation. A key limitation associated with coarse discretization, namely overlap between target-occupied and obstacle-occupied cells, is identified and mitigated through grid refinement, improving spatial accuracy and path feasibility. The proposed platform supports virtual evaluation of robotic operations prior to deployment and provides a foundation for BIM-informed robotic systems in facility management.

</details>


### [503] [PREFAIL: Identifying Precursors to Failures in Robotic Lift-and-Place Tasks to Improve Task Execution Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16921)
*Zeyu Shangguan,Rajas Chitale,Rutvik Patel,Satyandra K. Gupta,Daniel Seita*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文针对非抓取式物料搬运操作中的失败预测问题，提出PREFAIL方法，通过分析目标物体与载具的相对运动来预测失败前兆，并构建了包含最新干预时间的数据集，在仿真和真实场景中验证了该方法在预测准确性和及时性上的显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非抓取式操作中基于摩擦的支撑使得高速运动容易失败，而低速运行又增加周期时间，现有方法对动态动作敏感且高度依赖已知策略结构，同时缺乏对最新干预时间的精确刻画，导致无法判断检测到的失败是否还能及时阻止。

Method: 提出PREFAIL方法，通过分析目标物体相对于载具的相对运动来预测失败前兆；构建了精确标识最新干预时间的数据集，用于评估失败预测的可操作性。

Result: 在仿真和真实数据集上的实验表明，PREFAIL在失败前兆的预测准确性和响应及时性方面均有显著提升。

Conclusion: PREFAIL能够有效预测非抓取式物料搬运操作中的失败前兆，且通过引入最新干预时间的概念，使得失败预测更具可操作性，为高效可靠的机器人操作提供了新思路。

Abstract: Non-prehensile manipulation enables flexible material handling with part carriers, but friction-based support makes high-speed motions failure-prone, while slower operation increases cycle time. Proactive failure prediction is therefore essential for efficient and reliable performance, yet existing approaches remain limited by key constraints, including sensitivity to dynamic actions and high dependence on known policy structures. Furthermore, existing methods and datasets lack a precise characterization of the latest intervention time, leaving it unclear whether a detected failure can still be prevented through timely intervention. In this paper, we investigate lift-and-place tasks for non-prehensile material handling manipulation and propose a more effective approach to predicting precursors to failures (PREFAIL) by analyzing the relative motion of target objects with respect to the carrier. We further introduce a dataset that precisely identifies the latest intervention time for risky manipulations, enabling rigorous evaluation of whether a failure prediction is actionable. We validate our approach on both simulation and real-world datasets. Our experimental results demonstrate that PREFAIL substantially improves both the accuracy and timeliness of responses to failure precursors.

</details>


### [504] [SinD 2.0: A Multi-City UAV Dataset with Semantic Risk Annotations for SOTIF-Oriented Safety Validation at Signalized Intersections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16943)
*Yunwei Li,Shengjie Fu,Chunrong Chen,Chengxiang Zhao,Yuchen Fan,Mingyu Zhu,Yanchao Xu,Yuxin Zhang,Lan Yang,Chuzhao Li,Jie Ji,Yi He,Abhijit Sarkar,Akash Sonth,Hong Wang,Jun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了SinD 2.0，一个大规模无人机视角的交汇路口数据集，旨在解决自动驾驶系统在信号交叉口安全验证中的瓶颈问题。该数据集覆盖中国四座城市的六个信号交叉口，包含32,682个安全关键事件，并提供多层次语义标注（如交通违规、高风险交互、视觉遮挡等）及完整测试工具链，实验表明其能有效暴露ADS算法在不同城市域迁移中的性能局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自然驾驶数据集存在地理同质性、安全关键事件稀疏、缺乏语义风险标注等不足，难以支撑自动驾驶系统在信号交叉口场景下的泛化性评估和针对性SOTIF验证。

Method: 构建跨域多样性数据集SinD 2.0：覆盖多城市多路口拓扑；通过替代安全度量提取3.2万+安全关键事件；提供HD地图、SPaT数据及多维度语义标签；开发全栈测试工具链（场景提取、预测评估、开环回放、反应式闭环测试、逼真渲染）。

Result: 基准实验表明SinD 2.0在不同城市间存在显著域偏移，语义风险子集能有效暴露ADS算法的性能局限性。

Conclusion: SinD 2.0为自动驾驶系统在信号交叉口场景下的跨域安全验证提供了高质量数据基础与测试工具，有助于推动SOTIF验证与算法泛化性研究。

Abstract: Safety validation at signalized intersections remains a critical bottleneck for the deployment of autonomous driving systems (ADS), as these scenarios involve dense heterogeneous traffic, contested right of way, and long-tail safety-critical interactions, posing significant challenges to the Safety of the Intended Functionality (SOTIF). Existing naturalistic driving datasets often suffer from geographical homogeneity, sparsity of safety-critical events, and lack of semantic risk annotations, which limit the evaluation of algorithmic generalizability and targeted SOTIF verification. To address these gaps, this paper introduces SinD 2.0, a large-scale drone-based intersection dataset dedicated to cross-domain ADS safety analysis. The main contributions of SinD 2.0 are: (1) Cross-domain diversity: It covers six signalized intersections across four Chinese cities, capturing distinct intersection topologies and regional driving behavior characteristics; (2) High-density risk interactions: A total of 32,682 safety-critical events are extracted via surrogate safety measures, significantly enriching the density of boundary test scenarios; (3) Hierarchical semantic annotations: Besides integration with high-definition (HD) maps and Signal Phase and Timing (SPaT) data, it provides multi-dimensional semantic labels including traffic violations, high-risk interactions, visual shielding, and narrow feasible areas; (4) Full-stack testing toolchain: It supports automated scenario extraction, prediction-only evaluation, open-loop replay, reactive closed-loop testing, and photorealistic rendering. Benchmark experiments demonstrate that SinD 2.0 exhibits significant domain shifts across cities, and the semantic risk subsets can effectively expose the performance limitations of ADS algorithms. The dataset, annotations, and testing toolchain are available at https://github.com/SOTIF-AVLab/SinD/tree/main.

</details>


### [505] [G2-Nav: Grounded and Guarded Vision-Language Costmaps for Robot Social Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16956)
*Yuwen Liao,Yihang Lan,Yizhuo Yang,Ruimeng Liu,Xinhang Xu,Shenghai Yuan,Lihua Xie*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: G2-Nav提出了一种新颖的社交导航框架，通过将VLM的语义推理转化为可解释的视觉语言代价地图，并引入安全校验机制，实现了在非结构化环境中的安全、高效且符合社会规范的自主导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有社交导航方法存在两个问题：端到端框架如同不可预测的黑盒，而指令遵循方法无法实现完全自主。因此，需要一种既能利用VLM的高级智能，又能保证可解释性和安全性的导航框架。
